title: Cool enchants
body:
**This mod adds a series of enchantments of various types.**

- **Double Jump**: Applied to boots with a maximum level of 2, it allows you to jump in the air.
  
- **Dash**: Applied to pants with a maximum level of 1, it allows you to dash in the air when pressing the R key (configurable).
  
- **Nourishment**: Applied to chestplates with a maximum level of 2, it makes you take longer to get hungry.
  
- **Smelting Edge**: Applied to any item capable of breaking blocks with a maximum level of 4, it will smelt the block when mined. The higher the level, the higher the probability of smelting.
  
- More enchantments coming soon.

This mod has been programmed for **The Normal SMP**, but you can use it without any problem.
